chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ اللَّقِيطِ وَ وَلَدِ الزِّنَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 101 – Selling the found (child) and the child of adultery (bastard)

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ اللَّقِيطِ فَقَالَ حُرٌّ لَا يُبَاعُ وَ لَا يُوهَبُ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the found (abandoned child). So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Free. He can neither be sold nor gifted’.
